description_for_human: Get client onboarding, facility limit, and outreach details.
description_for_model: Use this plugin when the user asks for a client's onboarding status, first name, family name, current facility limit, or outreach highlights. The user must provide a client ID. Use only the tool response data and do not invent client information.

functions.name: get_client_onboarding_status
functions.description: Returns the onboarding status and message for a client ID.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, status, and message.

functions.name: get_client_basic_info
functions.description: Returns either the name or family value for a client ID.

field.description: The basic info field to retrieve.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, field, and value.

functions.name: get_client_facility_limit
functions.description: Returns the client's name and current facility limit in EUR.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, client_name, facility_limit_eur, currency, and formatted_limit.

functions.name: summarize_client_outreach
functions.description: Returns outreach highlights for a client, including reasons and total questions to answer.

returns.description: A JSON object with client_id, client_name, outreach_count, questions_to_answer_count, reasons, highlights, summary, and outreaches.

tools.name: get_client_onboarding_status
tools.description: Get the onboarding status for a client by client ID.

tools.name: get_client_basic_info
tools.description: Get a client's basic name or family value by client ID.

tools.name: get_client_facility_limit
tools.description: Get the current facility limit in EUR and client name for a client ID.

tools.name: summarize_client_outreach
tools.description: Summarize outreach highlights for a client, including outreach reasons and how many questions should be answered.

conversation_starters.title: Client family name
conversation_starters.text: What is the client's family name?

conversation_starters.title: Facility limit
conversation_starters.text: What is the current limit on my company's facility for client 123?

conversation_starters.title: Outreach highlights
conversation_starters.text: Summarize the outreach highlights for client 123
